title: Hellenia lacera
taxonomy: Hellenia lacera is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Hellenia lacera includes it being in the genus Hellenia. Hellenia lacera is a member of this family and is further classified based on its unique characteristics and traits.
